title: anabasis syriaca var. zoharyi
intro: Anabasis syriaca var. zoharyi, also known as Zohary's orach, is a variety of the Anabasis syriaca plant, a type of succulent herb that belongs to the Amaranthaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Anabasis syriaca var. zoharyi include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Anabasis syriaca var. zoharyi can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
